subject: feat(build): convert to Vite project
body:
Add Vite as the build tool so this repo serves as a working reference
implementation, not just documentation. Static files move to public/,
CLAUDE.md stays at repo root (for Claude Code) and gets copied to dist/
via a small Vite plugin. Deploy workflow now runs npm ci + vite build
before uploading dist/ to GitHub Pages.

- vite.config.js with base path and copy-root-files plugin
- public/ for static assets (texts, generated icons)
- Updated generate-icons.mjs to output to public/assets/images/
- Deploy workflow adds Node 20 setup and build step

Tags: build, vite, infrastructure
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: icon-system
Semver: minor
